functions.name: parse_cmake.rand.intersperse
documentation:
intersperse(ls, seps) puts a separator between each element of
ls, randomly chosen from seps.

functions.name: parse_cmake.rand.identifier
documentation: identifier(k) generates an identifier with up to k letters.

functions.name: parse_cmake.list_utils.merge_pairs
documentation:
Merges adjacent elements of list using the function merge
if they satisfy the predicate should_merge.

```pycon
>>> merge_pairs([], None, None)
[]
```

```pycon
>>> merge_pairs([1], None, None)
[1]
```

```pycon
>>> merge_pairs([1, 2], lambda x, y: False, None)
[1, 2]
```

```pycon
>>> merge_pairs([1, 2], lambda x, y: y == x + 1, lambda x, y: (x, y))
[(1, 2)]
```

```pycon
>>> merge_pairs([1, 2, 3], lambda x, y: y == x + 1, lambda x, y: (x, y))
[(1, 2), 3]
```

```pycon
>>> merge_pairs([1, 2, 3, 4], lambda x, y: y == x + 1, lambda x, y: (x, y))
[(1, 2), (3, 4)]
```

functions.name: parse_cmake.parsing.prettify
documentation: Returns the pretty-print of the contents of a CMakeLists file.

functions.name: parse_cmake.parsing.parse
documentation:
Parses a string s in CMakeLists format whose
contents are assumed to have come from the
file at the given path.

functions.name: parse_cmake.parsing.compose_lines
documentation: Yields pretty-printed lines of a CMakeLists file.

functions.name: parse_cmake.parsing.parse_file
documentation:
Yields line number ranges and top-level elements of the syntax tree for
a CMakeLists file, given a generator of tokens from the file.

toks must really be a generator, not a list, for this to work.

functions.name: parse_cmake.parsing.tokenize
documentation:
Yields pairs of the form (line_num, (token_type, token_contents))
given a string containing the contents of a CMakeLists file.

classes.name: parse_cmake.parsing.FormattingOptions
documentation:
Specifies the formatting options for pretty-printing CMakeLists.txt output.
The default configuration aims to match the house style used
by the CMake project itself. See https://github.com/Kitware/CMake

classes.name: parse_cmake.parsing.File

methods.name: parse_cmake.parsing.File.pretty_print
documentation:
Returns the pretty-print string for tree
with indentation given by the string tab.
Top node of the syntax tree for a CMakeLists file.
